statement: Given coins and a target, find the minimum number of coins to make the amount.
Given coins and a target, count how many distinct ways you can make the amount.
note: count variant, OUT per boundary policy

statement: Given coins with limited quantities and a target, find the minimum coins needed.
Find the longest strictly increasing subsequence in an array.
Find the longest non-decreasing subsequence in an array.
Find the longest increasing run of adjacent elements in an array.

Given an array, count how many subarrays have a positive sum.

Find the longest increasing subsequence of adjacent elements only.
